ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the track */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Secondary genre of the track */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the track is performed */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "producer_id" TEXT /* ID of the producer who produced the track */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "license" TEXT /* Licensing information for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the artist */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist was born */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to various social media platforms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_artists" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track (in BPM) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track (in dB) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Major or minor mode of the track */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the playlist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the playlist has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for music genres, artists, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being listened to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, pause, skip) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user at the time of activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chart (e.g., Top 100) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the chart ranking */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track featured in the chart */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the chart */,
  "previous_position" INTEGER /* Previous position of the track in the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
